title: Getting started
text: package designed simple use possible also allowing advanced customization. fact, since can upload tree metadata interactively, entirely valid create widget input: can also supply trees/metadata plot widget created. following types input data currently supported: Paths newick files Newick-formatted text (character vector single item) phylo objects ape package example, test data included package three formats: three commands produce plot: can also supply metadata tree supplying path TSV/CSV data.frame/tibble. table must “node_id” column values matching IDs treefile. example, data associated example tree: Similar tree input, paths parsed data accepted. Metadata can used color size tree elements, similar ggplot2 works. aesthetics parameter used specify columns correspond aesthetics. two commands produce plot: Check heat-tree javascript package documentation list valid aesthetics.
code: library(heattree) heat_tree() example_tree_path <- system.file('extdata', 'bansal_2021_tree.nwk', package = 'heattree') example_text <- readLines(example_tree_path) example_phylo <- ape::read.tree(example_tree_path) heat_tree(example_tree_path) heat_tree(example_text) heat_tree(example_phylo) example_metadata_path <- system.file('extdata', 'bansal_2021_metadata.tsv', package = 'heattree') example_metadata <- readr::read_tsv(example_metadata_path) print(example_metadata) #> # A tibble: 76 × 15 #>    Strain      `Genome size`   CDS `Genome status` `Source/Host` `Host taxonomy` #>    <chr>               <dbl> <dbl> <chr>           <chr>         <chr>           #>  1 Xanthomona…           4.9  3960 Draft           Sorghum vulg… Tracheophytes,… #>  2 Xanthomona…           4.2  3385 Draft           Oryza sativa… Tracheophytes,… #>  3 Xanthomona…           5.1  4416 Complete        Infected pep… Tracheophytes,… #>  4 Xanthomona…           5    3937 Draft           Medicago sat… Tracheophytes,… #>  5 Xanthomona…           5    4206 Draft           Leaves of So… Tracheophytes,… #>  6 Xanthomona…           5    4175 Complete        Phaseolus vu… Tracheophytes,… #>  7 Xanthomona…           5.1  4355 Draft           Citrus auran… Tracheophytes,… #>  8 Xanthomona…           4.4  3263 Draft           Axonopus sco… Tracheophytes,… #>  9 Xanthomona…           5.3  4208 Draft           Prunus persi… Tracheophytes,… #> 10 Xanthomona…           4.9  3845 Draft           Bromus carin… Tracheophytes,… #> # ℹ 66 more rows #> # ℹ 9 more variables: Lifestyle <chr>, Location <chr>, `Isolation year` <dbl>, #> #   `GC%` <dbl>, `# tRNA` <dbl>, Species <chr>, `Tree ID` <chr>, #> #   Completeness <dbl>, Contamination <dbl> heat_tree(example_tree_path, metadata = example_metadata_path, aesthetics = c(tipLabelColor = 'Lifestyle')) heat_tree(example_tree_path, metadata = example_metadata, aesthetics = c(tipLabelColor = 'Lifestyle'))

title: Getting started
text: Although widget primarily designed interactive use, initial settings can set programmatically. value options described heat-tree javascript package documentation can used optional parameters. example, layout can changed circular like :

title: Getting started
text: heat_tree widget capable managing multiple trees . initialize widget multiple trees, supply lists tree metadata inputs. metadata/aesthetics also supplied must list well corresponds list trees. example:
code: heat_tree(   tree = list(tree_1, tree_2),   metadata = list(metadata_1, metadata_2),   aesthetics = list(NULL, c(tipLabelColor = 'Lifestyle') )

title: Authors and Citation
text: Zachary Foster. Author, maintainer. Niklaus Grunwald. Author. USDA Agricultural Research Service. Funder.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Foster Z, Grunwald N (2026). heattree: wrapper javascript 'heat-tree' package interactive phylogenetic tree visualization widgets. R package version 0.2.1, https://grunwaldlab.github.io/heattree/.

what: A wrapper for the javascript `heat-tree` package for interactive phylogenetic tree visualization widgets
title: A wrapper for the javascript `heat-tree` package for interactive phylogenetic tree visualization widgets
text: package makes easy visualize, manipulate, export phylogenetic trees R using interactive viewer/editor. can insert tree viewer Rmd/Quarto documents make trees accessible online. want use web development outside R, consider javascript heat-tree package package builds upon.

title: A wrapper for the javascript `heat-tree` package for interactive phylogenetic tree visualization widgets
text: now, heattree available Github can installed devtools:

title: A wrapper for the javascript `heat-tree` package for interactive phylogenetic tree visualization widgets
text: package includes example data sets automatically loaded package (example_tree_1), can try minimal effort. installing packages, simply run lines get idea works:  See “Getting Started” page interactive examples
code: library(heattree) heat_tree(example_tree_1, metadata = example_metadata_1, aesthetics = c(tipLabelColor = 'source'), layout = 'circular')

title: Shiny bindings for heat_tree — heat_tree-shiny
code: heat_treeOutput(outputId, width = "100%", height = "400px")  renderheat_tree(expr, env = parent.frame(), quoted = FALSE)

title: Shiny bindings for heat_tree — heat_tree-shiny
text: outputId output variable read width, height Must valid CSS unit (like '100%', '400px', 'auto') number, coerced string 'px' appended. expr expression generates heat_tree env environment evaluate expr. quoted expr quoted expression (quote())? useful want save expression variable.

what: Create an interactive phylogenetic tree — heat_tree
title: Create an interactive phylogenetic tree — heat_tree
text: Create interactive phylogenetic tree using javascript heat-tree package

title: Create an interactive phylogenetic tree — heat_tree
code: heat_tree(   tree = NULL,   metadata = NULL,   aesthetics = NULL,   width = NULL,   height = NULL,   elementId = NULL,   ... )

title: Create an interactive phylogenetic tree — heat_tree
text: tree One trees plot. Can raw newick-formatted string, phylo object, list inputs. list provided, names used name trees. metadata Metadata associated tree. Can data.frame tibble "node_id" column. multiple trees (list), list table equal length required. list provided, names used name metadata tables. aesthetics named character vector defining metadata columns initially used color/size tree parts. multiple trees (list), list equal length required. width Width widget (CSS units number). height Height widget (CSS units number). elementId Optional element ID widget. ... Options passed options parameter underlying HeatTree.heatTree() javascript function modify initial state widget.

title: Create an interactive phylogenetic tree — heat_tree
